steps.title: Find k using the slope formula
steps.content:
All three points lie on a line with slope 2. Using points (3, 7) and (k, 11):
$$2 = \frac{11 - 7}{k - 3}$$
Simplify and solve:
$$2 = \frac{4}{k - 3}$$
$$2(k - 3) = 4$$
$$k - 3 = 2$$
$$k = 5$$

steps.title: Find n and calculate k + n
steps.content:
Using points (3, 7) and (12, n):
$$2 = \frac{n - 7}{12 - 3}$$
Simplify and solve:
$$2 = \frac{n - 7}{9}$$
$$18 = n - 7$$
$$n = 25$$
Therefore, $k + n = 5 + 25 = 30$.
